heading: Today
text: Morning clouds breaking for increasing sun. A stray shower, mainly south.

heading: Friday Night
temperature: 40s to low 50s, 40 in the cool spots

heading: Saturday
text: Sun, more clouds in NH and CT Valley. Breezy.

heading: Sunday
text: Rain showers, mixing with or changing to snow over high terrain.
temperature: Morning highs in the 40s to lower 50s
